name: grill-adapter
description: Host-agnostic Claude Code plugin that adds sectioned/cross-repo project wiki (Disclose/Carry/Bind/Capture), Lanhu requirements intake, and source-of-truth verify/lint as standalone skills + hooks — no host skill is ever patched. Defaults to grill (mattpocock/skills) as the front-end; also runs on plain Claude Code.
_comment: The component inventory (skills, agents, hooks/hooks.json, .mcp.json) is declared by the plugin layout in .claude-plugin/plugin.json and discovered by Claude Code. This manifest only carries what the plugin cannot express: which host convention block install.py writes into a target project's CLAUDE.md.
